scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n FRONTEND,API,WORKER,AI -c magenta,cyan,yellow,green "npm run dev --prefix frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0" "npm run start --prefix backend" "npm run worker:start --prefix backend" "./ai-service/.venv/bin/uvicorn --app-dir ai-service app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000"
